name: Harris Technology Group Limited
description: Harris Technology Group Limited is an Australia-based online retailer focusing on IT, consumer electronics, and household products. The company operates through various e-commerce platforms, including its own websites and major online marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, Catch, and Kogan. Harris Technology specializes in sourcing and distributing a wide range of technology products, office supplies, and consumer goods to small-to-medium businesses and retail customers across Australia.
